'''zhokamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hugantic|hugantic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hugantic|hugantic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhokamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokamithi|zhokamithi]] || [[word:zhokamiji|zhokamiji]] || [[word:zhokamishi|zhokamishi]] || [[word:zhokamiki|zhokamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokamuthuthu|zhokamuthuthu]] || [[word:zhokamujuju|zhokamujuju]] || [[word:zhokamushushu|zhokamushushu]] || [[word:zhokamukuku|zhokamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokamuthu|zhokamuthu]] || [[word:zhokamuju|zhokamuju]] || [[word:zhokamushu|zhokamushu]] || [[word:zhokamuku|zhokamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokamufthuf|zhokamufthuf]] || [[word:zhokamufjuf|zhokamufjuf]] || [[word:zhokamufshuf|zhokamufshuf]] || [[word:zhokamufkuf|zhokamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokamethe|zhokamethe]] || [[word:zhokameje|zhokameje]] || [[word:zhokameshe|zhokameshe]] || [[word:zhokameke|zhokameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokamothotho|zhokamothotho]] || [[word:zhokamojojo|zhokamojojo]] || [[word:zhokamoshosho|zhokamoshosho]] || [[word:zhokamokoko|zhokamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokamotho|zhokamotho]] || [[word:zhokamojo|zhokamojo]] || [[word:zhokamosho|zhokamosho]] || [[word:zhokamoko|zhokamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokamofthof|zhokamofthof]] || [[word:zhokamofjof|zhokamofjof]] || [[word:zhokamofshof|zhokamofshof]] || [[word:zhokamofkof|zhokamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokamïfthïf|zhokamïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfjïf|zhokamïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfshïf|zhokamïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfkïf|zhokamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokamïfthïfthïf|zhokamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfjïfjïf|zhokamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfshïfshïf|zhokamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfkïfkïf|zhokamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokamïfthïf|zhokamïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfjïf|zhokamïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfshïf|zhokamïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfkïf|zhokamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokamïfthïf|zhokamïfthïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfjïf|zhokamïfjïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfshïf|zhokamïfshïf]] || [[word:zhokamïfkïf|zhokamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhokamæthæ|zhokamæthæ]] || [[word:zhokamæjæ|zhokamæjæ]] || [[word:zhokamæshæ|zhokamæshæ]] || [[word:zhokamækæ|zhokamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhokamathatha|zhokamathatha]] || [[word:zhokamajaja|zhokamajaja]] || [[word:zhokamashasha|zhokamashasha]] || [[word:zhokamakaka|zhokamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhokamatha|zhokamatha]] || [[word:zhokamaja|zhokamaja]] || [[word:zhokamasha|zhokamasha]] || [[word:zhokamaka|zhokamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhokamafthaf|zhokamafthaf]] || [[word:zhokamafjaf|zhokamafjaf]] || [[word:zhokamafshaf|zhokamafshaf]] || [[word:zhokamafkaf|zhokamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhokamasha|zhokamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokamshësha|zhokamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokamrosha|zhokamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokamusha|zhokamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokamyasha|zhokamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokamnkshësha|gozhokamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokamnkrosha|gozhokamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokamnkmusha|gozhokamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokamnkyasha|gozhokamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhokakamasha|zhokakamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokakamshësha|zhokakamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokakamrosha|zhokakamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokakamusha|zhokakamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokakamyasha|zhokakamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokakamnkshësha|gozhokakamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokakamnkrosha|gozhokakamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokakamnkmusha|gozhokakamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokakamnkyasha|gozhokakamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhekæmasha|zhekæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhekæmshësha|zhekæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhekæmrosha|zhekæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhekæmusha|zhekæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhekæmyasha|zhekæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhekæmnkshësha|gozhekæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhekæmnkrosha|gozhekæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhekæmnkmusha|gozhekæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhekæmnkyasha|gozhekæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhokfamasha|zhokfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhokfamshësha|zhokfamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhokfamrosha|zhokfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhokfamusha|zhokfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhokfamyasha|zhokfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhokfamnkshësha|gozhokfamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhokfamnkrosha|gozhokfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhokfamnkmusha|gozhokfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhokfamnkyasha|gozhokfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
